_note: Catalog harvested LIVE 2026-06-11 (docs/phase-3/portal-research/up.md 'Live spike findings'). selector = the stable PeopleSoft element id where one exists; UP's plain fields carry proper labels (approach C), so label-driven JS is the default and ids are used for toolbar/grid/modal controls. `manual` fields are driven by dedicated adapter flows (new-application + captcha, emailed login, postcode/school/choice modals, subject grid, uploads), not the generic filler. university_id is resolved at wiring time from the universities row (seeded ids are uuid4).

fields.label: First Name
fields.help_text: public new-application form; prefills Personal Information

fields.label: Email Address (+ Confirm Email Address)
fields.help_text: UP emails the Application ID + password here — the EmailChallengeSource reads/relays them

fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.help_text: native <input type=date> — fill ISO yyyy-mm-dd, not the displayed mm/dd/yyyy

fields.label: South African National ID (after Identify me by = SA ID Number)
First Year of Study
fields.help_text: cascades from Career of Study; the open intake year is normally the only option (2027 in June 2026)

fields.label: *Security Code (case sensitive)
fields.help_text: six tags whose filenames spell the answer (UP_L_R_1.JPG -> lowercase r) — decoded from the DOM; vision solver fallback

fields.label: Preferred First Name
fields.help_text: ask the student; defaults to the first name

fields.label: Address Line 1
fields.help_text: lines 2-4 verified optional (saved with only line 1)

fields.label: City / Suburb (Select Postcode modal)
fields.help_text: City/Postal/Province inputs are DISABLED — the modal is mandatory. Broad terms (e.g. 'Soshanguve') pop '>300 matches, refine' (msg 31200, 8); selecting a row auto-fills city + postal code + province. Prefer Street Code rows for a street address.

fields.label: Postal Code (auto-filled by the postcode modal)
Gender
fields.help_text: three options live-verified (wider than the research's M/F)

fields.label: Tell us more
options: I am currently still in high school
I am or was a Post School Technical College student
I am or was a University of Technology student
I am or was a University student
I am unemployed and haven't studied before at a tertiary institution
I am working/employed and haven't studied before at a tertiary institution

fields.label: Do you have a disability?
fields.help_text: off for MVP — the Disability Detail modal (Category + Type + assistance) needs data the profile doesn't carry yet

fields.label: Were you prev enrolled at a University, a Univ of Technology or a Post School Technical College?
fields.help_text: No for matriculants; falsely answering No -> admission cancelled

fields.label: Final School Year
fields.help_text: drives the Examining Authority / grades-type cascade

fields.label: Examining Authority
fields.help_text: 26 boards live (DoEs + IEB/Cambridge/foreign...); derived '<province> DoE' default, fuzzy-matched against the live list

fields.label: School Name (Select school modal)
fields.help_text: input #UP_FAE_STG_SEDH_SCHOOL_NAME is disabled; modal: #UP_FAE_WRK_SEARCH_KEY + UP_FAE_WRK_SEARCH_BTN, rows SELECT_BTN$n, 'Enter School Manually' fallback link

fields.label: Highest grade completed
fields.help_text: Grade 11 for current matriculants

fields.label: Examination Number
fields.help_text: blank unless Grade 12 is complete

fields.label: Exemption Type
fields.help_text: sole option for a Grade-11 current matriculant

fields.label: Completed School Grades (subject + NSC level + percent, school-report order)
fields.help_text: 12 pre-rendered rows: subject #SCHOOL_CRSE_NBR$n (157 options, 'Name CODE'), level #CRSE_GRADE_INPUT$n (1-7), THEN percent #CRSE_GRADE_OFF$n appears offering ONLY that level's band (6 -> 70-79) — derive the level from the stored percentage and select it first. Remove row: #CLEAR_FLDS_PB$n. 'IMPORTANT: Grades must be entered in the same order as your school report.'

fields.label: First Choice (Select your study choice modal)
fields.help_text: modal: keyword #UP_FAE_WRK_SEARCH_KEY + UP_OAP_WRK_SEARCH_BTN (NOT the school modal's button id), rows SELECT_BTN$n (code/career/name/Open). LIVE eligibility gate on selection (msg 31100, 501 'Minimum admissions requirements not met') closes the modal and leaves the choice unset — the adapter retries the next-ranked open row (e.g. the 5-year extended variant). Accepted code lands in #UP_FAE_WRK_UP_CHOICE1.

fields.label: Second Choice
fields.help_text: same modal; value in #UP_FAE_WRK_UP_CHOICE2; swap = #UP_FAE_WRK_CHANGE_ORDER

fields.label: Do you wish to be considered for a residence place?
fields.help_text: Yes reveals Preferred Residence

fields.label: Have you or are you going to apply for NSFAS?
Do you wish or are you going to apply for UP Funding?
SA National ID: Student (Mandatory: Identity Document)
fields.help_text: File Attachment modal: My Device (#PT_ATTACH_MYDEVICE) -> chooser -> Upload (id '#ICUpload') -> 'Upload Complete' -> Done (id '#ICOK'). Fixed row indices: 0 SA ID, 1 Passport, 2 Gr11 Results, 3 Gr12 Results, 8 Cert of Conduct, 9 Academic Record, 10 Sporting

fields.label: Grade 11 Results OR Gr 12 Results (Mandatory: School Results)
fields.help_text: either one satisfies the mandatory group; matriculants upload Grade 11 final results (row 2)

fields.label: I confirm the declaration
fields.help_text: surfaced to the student per the consent decision; accepting it is NOT the submit ('I acknowledge that I have to click on verify and apply to finalise my application')
